title: Credit Risk Analyst (all genders)
required_skills: Business fluency in German and English
CICM qualification or degree in numerate discipline
Strong credit risk experience in multinational environment
missing_skills: Credit risk / credit facility management experience
core_responsibilities: Assess and manage credit risk across Europe
Review financial statements and maintain credit facilities
recommended_emphasis: Lead with HSBC financial analytics (budget variance dashboards, burn-rate reporting, C-suite storytelling) as strongest transferable signal
Frame Excel and Power BI explicitly as financial reporting instruments
State German level accurately (B1+), do not overstate
Do not fabricate credit risk or CICM credentials
